description: Internal partner input streams being evaluated for integration with this intelligence tool. Each partner group provides a distinct perspective on payments developments — operational, technical, client-facing, or analytical.

groups.name: Operations
groups.description: Payment operations team — settlement exceptions, counterparty issues, operational friction signals
groups.statusNote: Format alignment in progress. Contact established.

groups.name: Technology
groups.description: Engineering and architecture team — platform capability updates, API readiness, infrastructure roadmap
groups.statusNote: Evaluating structured export from internal project tracking.

groups.name: Marketing
groups.description: Product marketing — campaign signals, competitive positioning materials, client-facing messaging
groups.statusNote: Not yet onboarded. Intake form available.

groups.name: Data & Analytics
groups.description: Internal analytics — transaction volume trends, client behavior data, product performance metrics
groups.statusNote: API connection spec being reviewed by data governance.

groups.name: Risk Management
groups.description: Risk and compliance team — fraud pattern signals, regulatory watch items, counterparty risk flags
groups.statusNote: Not yet onboarded. Intake form available.

groups.name: Product
groups.description: Product management — roadmap context, client feedback themes, feature prioritization signals
groups.statusNote: Not yet onboarded. Intake form available.
